title: The Grand Tournament
description: Use all the evidence to deduce the mixing results.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing1 and ing2, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing1=R- (ing1 has R-), ing2=R+ (ing2+ing6=R+: both share R+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing1=G+ (ing1+ing3=G+: both share G+), ing2=G- (ing2 has G-)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing1=B+ (ing1 has B+), ing2=B+ (ing2 has B+)
      → SAME sign + → B+ resolves.

To find the result of mixing ing1 and ing6, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing1=R- (ing1 has R-), ing6=R+ (ing2+ing6=R+: both share R+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing1=G+ (ing1+ing3=G+: both share G+), ing6=G+ (ing6 has G+)
      → SAME sign + → G+ resolves.

To find the result of mixing ing1 and ing4, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing1=R- (ing1 has R-), ing4=R- (ing4+ing7=R-: both share R-)
      → SAME sign - → R- resolves.
